text: I'm so proud of you for quitting this habit. I know how much you struggled with it, and I watched you work through the hard days when it would have been so much easier to give in. What you've done takes real courage and determination. This is a huge accomplishment, and you should be incredibly proud of yourself. I believe in you, and I'm honored to be here cheering you on as you move forward into this next chapter. You've got this.
